'''Edusa''' was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrial planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Morshdine sector/Legends|Morshdine sector]]. During the [[Great Galactic War]], the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Youngling/Legends|girl]] [[Leontyne Saresh]] there, and she eventually incited a [[Edusa revolt|revolt]] of enslaved beings on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] before departing for [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]].

Edusa was located within the borders of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] displaying the [[Blazing Claw/Legends|Blazing Claw]] emblem were frequently encountered there. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] eventually [[Attack on the Edusa system|conquered]] the [[Edusa system/Legends|Edusa system]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Description==
Edusa was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SWTORE" /> located in the [[Edusa system/Legends|Edusa system]], a part of the [[Morshdine sector/Legends|Morshdine sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A [[Axxila–Tangrene hyperlane/Legends|hyperlane]] linked it to the [[Camden system/Legends|Camden]] and [[Tangrene system/Legends|Tangrene systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
[[Realspace/Legends|Space]] surrounding Edusa was [[Scout/Legends|explored]] between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and [[3000 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" /> At some between the beginning and end of the [[Great Galactic War]] of [[3681 BBY]]–[[3653 BBY]], the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] on Edusa a group of individuals, including the [[Youngling/Legends|young]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|girl]] [[Leontyne Saresh]]. Her childhood was filled with hardship and brutality, but the girl did not abandon hope for freedom, and eventually Saresh rallied her fellow enslaved people and incited a [[Edusa revolt|revolt]] against their Imperial captors. Escaping from Edusa, Saresh traveled to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] space and dedicated her life to combating the injustices of the Sith Empire, ultimately going on to become the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]].<ref name="SWTORE" />

[[File:Leontyne_Saresh.png|thumb|right|300px|The future Galactic Republic Supreme Chancellor Leontyne Saresh incited a revolt of enslaved beings on Edusa.]]
By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Edusa was situated within the borders of the Republic.<ref name="TEA" /> During the first campaigns of that conflict, however, the planet fell within the territory controlled by the Republic's enemy, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], with the [[Tenth Army|Tenth Sector Army]] of the Republic being tasked with engaging the Confederacy's [[Confederacy military/Legends|military forces]] in Edusa's vicinity. The planet had become a part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" /> However, by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Edusa was one among a corridor of [[Factory world/Legends|industrial worlds]] where the [[Blazing Claw/Legends|Blazing Claw]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] emblem was seen more frequently than either the [[Imperial crest/Legends|Imperial crest]] or the banner of the Empire's enemy in the conflict, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Handbook">[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>

Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], Edusa was located within the borders of the [[Imperial Remnant]],<ref name="EGTW" /> and the population of the Edusa [[Star system/Legends|system]] around [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] numbered between one and ten billion. The [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Attack on the Edusa system|conquered]] the system at some point between 25 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] as part of their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and it remained in Yuuzhan Vong control at least until [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Edusa was introduced in ''[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'', a [[Star Wars Handbook|companion]] issue to [[Dark Horse Comics]]' ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series. The issue was authored by [[Peet Janes]]<ref name="Handbook" /> and published on [[July 1]], [[1998]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53964/star_wars_handbook_1_x-wing_rogue_squadron_1998_1|text=Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron (1998) #1}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Edusa system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square O-5.<ref name="TEA" />
